expected_behavior: Validates that 142 matches ^\d+$ before using it in any gh command
Loads golden standards from the standards/ directory
Gets changed files from the PR using gh pr diff and wraps them in untrusted-pr-content markers
Launches the 5 review agents focused on the changed files
Categorizes the changes (source files, tests, docs) and applies relevant review sections
Generates an incremental review report assessing change impact and regression risk
